summary: A clip from a CBS Mornings segment. A reporter in sunglasses and a headset rides an airboat along a river, gesturing toward the water. The segment cuts to a Border Patrol agent in uniform standing beside a steel border fence topped with coils of concertina wire, speaking to the reporter. The lower-third reads SOUTHERN BORDER CRISIS TURNS CALM, CBS NEWS REVISITS SITUATION IN EAGLE PASS, TX.

script.scene: A reporter on an airboat gestures toward a river; lower-third reads SOUTHERN BORDER CRISIS TURNS CALM.
A Border Patrol agent stands by a concertina-wire fence speaking to the reporter; banner notes EAGLE PASS, TX.
Continued footage with the CBS Mornings framing.

notable_text: SOUTHERN BORDER CRISIS TURNS CALM; CBS NEWS REVISITS SITUATION IN EAGLE PASS, TX; CBS MORNINGS
